race.comment: Tricky Maiden with plenty of chances. MAIDOFF (4) failed to back up the solid second at Rosehill two-back, when he struggled in the soft (7) going to finish a fading seventh over 1400m at Warwick Farm. Since fitted with a 789m trial win and can make amends on the firmer surface. MIRRORS (10) three-year-old filly by I Am Invincible from Unbelievable on debut for the Maher yard. Fitted with the four trials and not to be underestimated. NONNO'S POWER (5) resumes. Failed to fire on debut with a battling eighth over 1200m at Warwick Farm last October. Wasn't pushed out in his two trials and stays in the mix. MAGIC FLAMES (9) just under a month between runs when she chipped away late to finish fourth over 1400m at Newcastle. Likely to go back and be ridden for luck from the wide gate.
